```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
target_count = counts.get(target, 0)

assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0
assert len(target) == 15
assert target_count == max(counts.values())
assert sum(1 for v in counts.values() if v == target_count) == 1

expected_distractors = {
    "101010101010100": 0.09,
    "101010101010111": 0.08,
    "001010101010101": 0.06,
    "111010101010101": 0.05,
}
for bitstring in expected_distractors:
    assert target_count > counts.get(bitstring, 0)

assert target_count / shots > 0.30
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

target_count = counts.get(target, 0)
assert target_count == max(counts.values()), (target, target_count, counts)

sorted_counts = sorted(counts.items(), key=lambda kv: kv[1], reverse=True)
assert sorted_counts[0][0] == target, sorted_counts[:5]

if len(sorted_counts) > 1:
    second_count = sorted_counts[1][1]
    assert target_count > second_count, (target_count, second_count, sorted_counts[:5])

target_prob = target_count / shots
assert target_prob > 0.3, target_prob
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
assert target in counts, f"Target bitstring {target} missing from counts"

target_count = counts[target]
other_counts = {k: v for k, v in counts.items() if k != target}

assert other_counts, "Expected at least one non-target outcome"
assert target_count == max(counts.values()), f"Target {target} is not the most frequent outcome"
assert sum(1 for v in other_counts.values() if target_count > v) == len(other_counts), (
    f"Target {target} is not clearly amplified over all other outcomes"
)

target_prob = target_count / shots
assert target_prob > 0.3, f"Target probability too low: {target_prob}"
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
```
```python
assert target in counts, f"Target bitstring {target} missing from counts"

target_count = counts[target]
other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != target]

assert other_counts, "Expected at least one non-target outcome in counts"
assert target_count == max(counts.values()), f"Target {target} is not the most frequent outcome"
assert sum(1 for v in other_counts if target_count > v) == len(other_counts), (
    f"Target {target} is not clearly amplified over all other outcomes"
)

target_prob = target_count / shots
second_prob = max(other_counts) / shots
assert target_prob > 0.3, f"Target probability too low: {target_prob}"
assert target_prob > second_prob * 2, (
    f"Target probability {target_prob} is not at least 2x the next highest {second_prob}"
)
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
```
```python
assert target in counts, "Target bitstring missing from counts"

target_count = counts[target]
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"

others = [(bitstring, count) for bitstring, count in counts.items() if bitstring != target]
assert others, "Expected non-target outcomes to compare against"

max_other = max(count for _, count in others)
assert target_count > max_other, f"Target count {target_count} is not greater than best non-target count {max_other}"

target_prob = target_count / shots
max_other_prob = max_other / shots
assert target_prob > 0.3, f"Target probability too low: {target_prob}"
assert target_prob > max_other_prob * 2, f"Target is not clearly amplified: target_prob={target_prob}, max_other_prob={max_other_prob}"
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
target_count = counts.get(target, 0)

assert target in counts, "Target bitstring missing from counts"
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots, "Counts do not sum to shots"

max_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
max_count = counts[max_bitstring]

assert max_bitstring == target, f"Target is not the most frequent result: got {max_bitstring}"
assert target_count == max_count
assert target_count / shots > 0.3, f"Target not clearly amplified enough: {target_count/shots:.3f}"

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    if bitstring != target:
        assert target_count > count, f"Non-target outcome {bitstring} is not below target"
```

```python
target = metadata.get("target_bitstring", "101010101010101")
```

```python
sorted_counts = sorted(counts.values(), reverse=True)
second_best = sorted_counts[1] if len(sorted_counts) > 1 else 0

target_prob = target_count / shots
```
